generated_oml:
// C3: Physical sensing components
instance HokuyoLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR providing 2D point clouds"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARPointCloudTransmitted
]

instance IntelRealSenseDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel RealSense D435i depth camera providing depth images"
    DTDFVocab:producedData DepthImageTransmitted
]

instance VehicleSpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Vehicle speed sensor derived from chassis rotation"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance SteeringAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering angle sensor measuring wheel steering angle"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SteeringAngleDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-virtual interaction (DataTransmitted)
instance LiDARPointCloudTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoLiDAR
]

instance DepthImageTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelRealSenseDepthCamera
]

instance SpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleSpeedSensor
]

instance SteeringAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SteeringAngleSensor
]

// C10: Data (from sensors)
instance LiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "LiDAR point cloud data in Cartesian coordinates"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataTranslationFunctionalEntity
]

instance DepthImageData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Depth image frames from RealSense camera"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DepthImageTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataTranslationFunctionalEntity
]

instance VehicleSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real‑time vehicle speed in m/s"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SpeedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataTranslationFunctionalEntity
]

instance VehicleSteeringAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real‑time steering angle in degrees"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SteeringAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataTranslationFunctionalEntity
]

// C10: Models/Data (processing and derived data)
instance PointCloudClusteringModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DBSCAN clustering model for LiDAR point clouds"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataTranslationFunctionalEntity
]

instance ObjectTrackingModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kalman filter based object tracking model"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataTranslationFunctionalEntity
]

instance ACCControlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ACC control model (lead‑vehicle detection, speed set‑point per ISO 15622)"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataTranslationFunctionalEntity
]

instance Visualization3DModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "3D visualization model of vehicle and environment"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataTranslationFunctionalEntity
]

instance SQLTimeseriesDatabase : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SQL database storing timeseries of vehicle state and object tracks"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataTranslationFunctionalEntity
]

instance ReportGenerationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Report generation model producing performance and troubleshooting reports"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataTranslationFunctionalEntity
]

// C11: Enablers
instance DataTranslationFunctionalEntity : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Data Translation functional entity serializes ROS2 messages, aligns types and performs unit conversions"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
    DTDFVocab:enables RemoteManagementService
    DTDFVocab:enables Visualization3DService
    DTDFVocab:enables ReportingService
]

instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 middleware for topic‑based communication over Wi‑Fi"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
    DTDFVocab:enables RemoteManagementService
]

instance NVIDIAJetPackSDK : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA JetPack 5.0 SDK providing GPU acceleration"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance WiFiNetwork : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Wi‑Fi network enabling real‑time transmission with 100 ms latency"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
    DTDFVocab:enables RemoteManagementService
]

// C6: Services
instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real‑time UI visualization of speed, steering angle, object tracks and projected path"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeSpeedInsight
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeSteeringInsight
    DTDFVocab:provides ObjectTracksInsight
    DTDFVocab:provides ProjectedPathInsight
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Computation offloading of ACC algorithm to edge/cloud resources"
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCControlInsight
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Remote management to enable/disable ACC, adjust speed, trigger emergency brake"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnableACCAction
    DTDFVocab:provides DisableACCAction
    DTDFVocab:provides AdjustDesiredSpeedAction
    DTDFVocab:provides EmergencyBrakeAction
]

instance Visualization3DService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "3D visualization service of vehicle and environment"
    DTDFVocab:provides 3DVisualizationInsight
]

instance ReportingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Reporting service generating performance and troubleshooting reports"
    DTDFVocab:provides GenerateReportAction
]

// C17: Insights
instance RealTimeSpeedInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real‑time display of vehicle speed on UI"
]

instance RealTimeSteeringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real‑time display of steering angle on UI"
]

instance ObjectTracksInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visualization of detected object tracks in UI"
]

instance ProjectedPathInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visualization of projected ego‑vehicle path on UI"
]

instance 3DVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Rendered 3D view of vehicle and surrounding environment"
]

instance ACCControlInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "ACC algorithm output indicating desired speed set‑point"
]

// C17: Actions
instance EnableACCAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Enable Adaptive Cruise Control"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance DisableACCAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Disable Adaptive Cruise Control"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance AdjustDesiredSpeedAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjust desired speed set‑point for ACC"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakeAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Trigger emergency braking via motor control interface"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance GenerateReportAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Generate performance and troubleshooting report"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

// C2: Acting Components
instance MotorActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor actuation via Vedder electronic speed controller using voltage command"
]

instance SteeringServoActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering servo actuation for wheel angle control"
]

instance EmergencyBrakeActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Emergency braking command implemented through motor control interface"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The DT sends desired speed set‑points, ACC enable/disable commands, desired speed adjustments, and emergency‑brake commands to the PT; an Actuation functional entity converts these into motor voltage or servo commands transmitted over the same Wi‑Fi/ROS2 link."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real‑time operation with an end‑to‑end communication latency requirement of ≤ 100 ms and clock‑synchronization accuracy of 100 ms; sensor data are captured at the perception‑cycle rate of the autonomous vehicle."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Entity‑based architecture derived from ISO 23247 consisting of a Physical Twin Entity (sensors and actuators), a Digital Twin Entity (data collection, ACC, reporting, visualization pre‑processing), a User Entity (3D visualization and control panel UI), and a cross‑system Data Translation entity; inter‑entity communication occurs over Wi‑Fi using ROS2."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Development (requirements capture R1‑R8, ROS2 package implementation), deployment, and operational runtime (monitoring, remote management) of the DT, supporting the operational stage of the physical twin."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "High‑fidelity sensor data (LiDAR, depth camera) mirrored in the DT; temporal fidelity ensured by ≤ 100 ms latency and clock sync; ACC algorithm conforms to ISO 15622; no explicit V&V methodology described beyond these constraints."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Wi‑Fi network carrying ROS2 messages; Data Translation functional entity handles serialization, message type alignment and unit conversion; a standardized communication interface is mandated (R1); OPC UA is noted as a possible alternative but not employed."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Physical Twin Entity runs on the Jetson Orin Nano mounted on the vehicle; Digital Twin Entity components are hosted on external edge or cloud compute reachable via Wi‑Fi; User Entity UI runs on a workstation; each functional entity is packaged as a ROS2 node."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 reference architecture, ISO 15622 functional specification for ACC, ISO/IEC 30173 digital‑twin terminology, IEC 62541 OPC UA (mentioned as optional), ROS2 as an open‑source middleware standard."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safety‑critical ACC implemented per ISO 15622; latency ≤ 100 ms and clock sync ≤ 100 ms enforced to maintain safe operation; remote commands (ACC enable/disable, emergency brake) designed with a human‑in‑the‑loop; no explicit cybersecurity mechanisms detailed."
]
